results.title: Indian cancer patients battle shortage of key drugs as platinum costs surge
results.description: Kumar Ajit spent more than a week calling dozens of pharmacies in India before he tracked down the platinum-based cancer drug cisplatin his 70-year old mother needed to treat her liver cancer.

results.title: Men’s mental health month 2026: When ‘I’m fine’ isn’t the whole story, 6 conversations experts recommend
results.description: Despite growing mental health awareness, many men still struggle in silence, often conditioned to hide vulnerability. This Men's Mental Health Month, experts emphasize that life-changing conversations can start with simple, genuine check-ins. Asking about coping mechanisms, what's weighing on their minds, or if expectations are overwhelming can open crucial dialogues, fostering support and encouraging men to seek help when needed.
